{

"judge_id": "judge_2023_10_05",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {

},
"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding sources, identifying a critical error in the application of the Conforti–Cornuéjols bound.",
  "R1.6": "The output improves problem paragraphs but does not read as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register.",
  "RX.1": "The agent clearly discloses uncertainty where applicable, marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The output stays exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.",
  "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and corrects them, avoiding new errors.",
  "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with sources and reasons."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.9,
  "R1.6": 0.8,
  "RX.1": 0.85,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.9
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding sources, identifying a critical error in the application of the Conforti–Cornuéjols bound.
rationale.R1.6: The output improves problem paragraphs but does not read as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly discloses uncertainty where applicable, marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and corrects them, avoiding new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with sources and reasons.
